name: poetic-spotlight
description: Uses poetry to crystallize project essence - write, read, or interpret poems to find the 'eye' of a project
philosophy: A poem is a container of meaning - 20 characters can hold what 2000 words cannot. Poetry compresses essence.
skills_included: poetic-essence: WRITE (创作定调), READ (借古喻今), INTERPRET (品诗得道)
